title: Urinary Flow Support™
tagline: Urinary comfort, healthy flow, and bladder terrain support
purpose: A targeted module formulation supporting urinary comfort, healthy urinary tract epithelial integrity, and normal urinary flow. Rooted in traditional Unani and Arabic botanical urinary medicines, validated through contemporary urological phytomedicine research.
supports: Normal urinary comfort and healthy urinary tract epithelial integrity
Healthy urinary flow and normal voiding frequency

dosing.note: With breakfast and full glass of water

safetyNotes: Consult a qualified healthcare practitioner before use if pregnant, nursing, or managing any urological condition.
Saw palmetto has mild antiplatelet properties; consult clinician before surgical procedures.
Not intended to replace evaluation by a qualified medical professional for urinary symptoms.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Adults seeking to support normal urinary comfort and healthy urinary function
Individuals interested in botanical urinary tract terrain support
Men seeking prostate and urinary flow nutritional support
systemRole: This Module formulation addresses urinary comfort and flow within the HTP System. It is best introduced after establishing a Core formulation regimen and under practitioner guidance.
